entry.title: IDC W56KGY17D0006 (P00008) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CORRECT THE CONTACT END DATE THAT WAS ERRONEOUSLY CHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56KGY17D0006 (P00009) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PURSUANT TO THE CHANGES CLAUSE (FAR 52.243-1 (CHANGES-FIXED PRICE) OF BASIC CONTRACT NUMBER W56KGY-17-D-0006, THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE ESTABLISHED RANGE PRICING FOR MANPACK ON A FIRM FIXED PRICE (FFP) BASIS

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56KGY17D0006 (P00015) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00015, ISSUED AGAINST W56KGY-17-D-0006 IS TO UPDATE THE GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY (GFP) IN SECTION J, ATTACHMENT 0004. THIS REVISED GFP SHALL REPLACE THE PRIOR GFP IN ITS ENTIRETY.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
